name: io.github.mova-compact/mova-flat-runner
description: Governed AI workflow execution for Claude and MCP-compatible clients. Run invoice OCR, AML triage, credit review, supplier screening, and custom contracts — each with a mandatory human decision gate and a cryptographically signed audit trail.

package_arguments.name: MOVA_API_KEY
package_arguments.description: MOVA API key. Use test-key-001 to get started without registration.

package_arguments.name: LLM_KEY
package_arguments.description: OpenRouter API key (sk-or-v1-...). Required for workflow runs with LLM analysis steps.

package_arguments.name: LLM_MODEL
package_arguments.description: OpenRouter model ID for LLM analysis steps.

package_arguments.name: MOVA_API_URL
package_arguments.description: Override the MOVA API base URL.
